MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Lawrence D. Murray, Esq. 673-0555 for petitioner & moving party; Stacey A. Lucas, Deputy City Atty 554-3949 for respondent & opposing party.
RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission. Proposed order submitted by respondent; petitioner to submit proposed order by Monday.
